name: @mlui/desktop
description: Electron desktop shell for the MLUI LiteGraph workspace.
author: MLUI

scripts.build: bun run build:main && bun run build:preload && vite build
scripts.build:main: bun build src/main/index.ts --outfile dist/main/index.js --target node --format esm --external electron
scripts.build:preload: bun build src/preload/index.ts --outfile dist/preload/index.cjs --target node --format cjs --external electron
scripts.package: bun run clean:release && bun run build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.package:win: bun run clean:release && bun run build && electron-builder --win portable zip --publish never
scripts.package:linux: bun run clean:release && bun run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage tar.gz --publish never
scripts.package:mac: bun run clean:release && bun run build && electron-builder --mac zip --publish never
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 && bun run build:main && bun run build:preload && cross-env MLUI_DESKTOP_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist/main/index.js
scripts.fmt: oxfmt --write src vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json electron-builder.json index.html
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check src vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json electron-builder.json
